data.title: US stocks hit new records as Magnificent Seven reach $19 trillion market cap. S&P 500 up 0.4% to 6,390, Nasdaq 100 rises 0.5% to 23,330. NVIDIA Corp. reaches $4.25 trillion. Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF up 1.4% this week. Market buoyed by trade talks and corporate earnings optimism. Investors anticipating possible 15% tariff.
data.description: Investors on Wall Street are experiencing a positive end to the week as large-cap benchmarks are gaining momentum in Friday's midday trading session. The S&P 500 saw a 0.4% increase, reaching 6,390, marking a new all-time high. The Nasdaq 100 also climbed 0.5%, surpassing 23,330, driven by the strength in the tech and consumer sectors. The QQQ ETF has surged by 40% from April's lows. The total market capitalization of the Magnificent Seven has now reached a record $19 trillion, with NVIDIA Corp. alone reaching $4.25 trillion. The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF is up by 1.4% this week and is on track for its seventh weekly gain in the last eight weeks. Optimism over corporate earnings and advancements in global trade talks have bolstered the markets. European officials have confirmed a meeting with President Donald Trump on Sunday in Brussels, leading to anticipation in the market over a potential 15% tariff implementation by the U.S. For more details, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: VerSprite in Atlanta earns CREST/CIS accreditation, demonstrating commitment to cybersecurity standards and quality services.
data.description: VerSprite, a prominent cybersecurity firm based in Atlanta, has recently obtained the prestigious CREST/CIS accreditation. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to upholding top-notch cybersecurity practices and providing outstanding services to its customers. By receiving the CIS Security Controls certification, VerSprite demonstrates its commitment to surpassing industry standards. This accreditation solidifies VerSprite's position as a global leader in cybersecurity, showcasing their adherence to a comprehensive set of controls that establish a foundational level of security expertise.

data.title: Ethereum surges 52% in July hitting $3,642.24, market cap at $439.4 billion. Analysts expect short-term correction.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) has seen a significant increase of 52% in the last month, currently priced at $3,642.24 with a market cap of $439.4 billion, showing a 7-day upward trend of 2.3%. On the other hand, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $115,562.31 with a market cap of $2.29 trillion, experiencing a slight decrease of 2%. XRP stands at $3.03 with a market cap of $179.9 billion, undergoing a 10% decrease. Analysts predict a short-term correction for Ethereum before its next surge, with a key support level at $3,000 according to trader Posty. Despite a possible dip below $3,500, the 1-hour trendline for Ethereum remains unbroken, indicating potential for a continuation of the upward trend. Full details are available online.

data.title: XRP's potential peak at $3.65 may have concluded; specific actions needed for recovery.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 4.5%, which translates to about 9.3 million people currently without jobs. Additionally, the stock market has shown a decrease of 2.5% in the last week, impacting investors and financial institutions. On a positive note, the GDP growth for the quarter has exceeded expectations, standing at 6.2%. This data indicates a mix of challenges and opportunities for the economy moving forward.

data.title: Tokenized money market funds aim to rival stablecoins amid US's stablecoin adoption. Goldman Sachs and BNY Mellon lead the push.
data.description: Goldman Sachs and BNY Mellon are working on tokenization efforts to maintain competitiveness in money market funds amidst the increasing adoption of stablecoins in the US. A JPMorgan strategist highlighted this move as important for the industry.

data.title: Inventor from Silverado, Calif., develops EDDIE MIRACLE CLUBS for easier transport. environmentally friendly design.
data.description: A resident of Silverado, California shared their innovative invention of the EDDIE MIRACLE CLUBS during a press release in Pittsburgh on July 25, 2025. The inventor aimed to design a new collection of golf clubs that would be more convenient for transportation compared to traditional sets. Their environmentally friendly approach resulted in the creation of these clubs to meet the needs of golfers.

data.title: Almadex Minerals Ltd provides update on Logan Zinc-Silver Project in Yukon, Canada with a 2% NSR royalty at Tim Property.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Almadex Minerals Ltd. (TSX-V: DEX) shared an update on its Logan Zinc-Silver Project in Yukon Territory, Canada. The Company also discussed recent advancements at the Tim Property, where they have a 2% net smelter return (NSR) royalty. This report signifies Almadex's ongoing focus on its mining projects in the region, showcasing their commitment to exploration and development. The Logan project and the Tim Property represent key assets for the company, contributing to its overall portfolio growth and potential profitability in the mining sector.

data.title: CS Analytical expands services with Gas Testing Analytical for pharmaceuticals and biotech; offers specialized testing and validation for gases and utilities.
data.description: Gas Testing Analytical is set to provide crucial testing, sampling, and validation services for gases and utilities in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device manufacturing sectors in CLIFTON, N.J. The company's services will ensure product quality and patient safety in these industries that heavily rely on unseen infrastructure. This specialized testing will cover a wide range of gases and utilities, aiming to meet the specific needs of each sector. This initiative comes at a time when the importance of rigorous testing in these industries is more paramount than ever.

data.title: RBLP authorizes new Training Partners in Ohio, offering opportunities for aspiring leaders in professional development.
data.description: On July 25, 2025 in Burbank, California, an announcement was made encouraging individuals interested in assisting others in reaching their career aspirations to consider becoming an RBLP Authorized Training Partner (ATP). These partners are responsible for running their own businesses and offer preparation courses for leadership roles. If this opportunity interests you, explore becoming an RBLP ATP to make a positive impact on individuals pursuing their professional objectives.

data.title: Inventor from Costa Mesa creates tool for cleaning pet vomit to prevent cross-contamination.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 25, 2025, an inventor from Costa Mesa, California shared their motivation behind creating a new tool to clean up pet vomit. The inventor aimed to address the issue of cross-contamination often linked with traditional cleaning methods. The tool is designed to be convenient, environmentally friendly, and innovative in tackling this common problem.

data.title: Gateway Fiber launches high-speed internet in Cottage Grove with ribbon-cutting ceremony on July 24, offering residents and businesses next-generation connectivity.
data.description: In Cottage Grove, Minnesota, Gateway Fiber recently celebrated a milestone with a ribbon-cutting ceremony on July 24, launching its high-speed fiber internet service for residents and businesses. The event, attended by community leaders, residents, business owners, and Chamber of Commerce members, highlighted Gateway Fiber's dedication to providing advanced connectivity to the area. Cottage Grove is now equipped with fast fiber internet thanks to this initiative.

data.title: Vixen by Micheline Pitt launches Bride of Frankenstein Collection to mark 90th anniversary. Celebrating horror icon through modern fashion.
data.description: Los Angeles-based fashion brand Vixen by Micheline Pitt, founded by a female entrepreneur, recently launched the official Bride of Frankenstein capsule collection. This collection pays homage to the iconic horror figure with a modern and feminine touch. The launch took place on July 25, 2025, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences. This exciting collection is set to captivate fashion enthusiasts with its unique and innovative take on the horror genre.
